{% for distro in page.distros %} {% for type in distro.media %} {% for os in distro.versions %} {% assign startPrice = "7.99" %} {% assign bestOfferAutoAcceptPrice = "5.99" %} {% assign minimumBestOfferPrice = "4.99" %} {% assign cFormat = "DVD" %} {% if type == "USB" %} {% assign startPrice = "10.99" %} {% assign bestOfferAutoAcceptPrice = "7.99" %} {% assign minimumBestOfferPrice = "6.99" %} {% assign cFormat = "USB" %} {% elsif type == "1.44 MB Floppy" %} {% assign startPrice = "9.99" %} {% assign bestOfferAutoAcceptPrice = "7.99" %} {% assign minimumBestOfferPrice = "6.99" %} {% assign cFormat = "Floppy 3.5"" %} {% elsif type == "CD" %} {% assign cFormat = "CD" %} {% endif %} {% capture image_string %}{{ distro.name }} {{ type }} {{ os.number | remove: "." }} {{ os.label }}{% endcapture %} {% assign image_slug = image_string | slugify %} {% capture raw_full_title %}{{ distro.name }} {{ os.number }} {{ os.label }} Bootable/Live Install {{ type }} NEW{% endcapture %} {% assign full_title = raw_full_title | split: ' ' | join: ' ' %} {% if full_title.size > 80 %} {% capture raw_short_title %}{{ distro.name }} {{ os.number }} {{ os.label }} Install {{ type }} NEW{% endcapture %} {% assign ebay_title = raw_short_title | split: ' ' | join: ' ' %} {% if ebay_title.size > 80 %} {% assign ebay_title = ebay_title | slice: 0, 80 %} {% endif %} {% else %} {% assign ebay_title = full_title %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %}

Add 11226 {{ ebay_title }} 1000 {{ distro.name }} {{ cFormat }} https://cloudbreak.app/external/ebay/{{ image_slug }}.png {{ ebay_title }}. On consumer-grade media, made to order. The latest version of the software in the release series will be shipped. For example, if you order the Debian 12.x series, you will receive Debian 12.5 (or the newest point release available at the time your order is processed). An order for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS will automatically include the latest 24.04.4 update (or newer). This media is proudly assembled and distributed by CloudBreak. Check out our other items for other versions and other software!
